maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Update test setup to assign fields directly instead of using setter methods, implying a change in the production class visibility or structure.
Update test setup to assign excludes field directly instead of using setter method.
Update test setup to assign searchPaths field directly instead of using setter method.
Fix test logic to correctly verify file exclusion by checking the result of fetchFilesToTestFromSearchPaths.
Add new test case to verify artifact loading into project classloader using JUnit 5 @TempDir.

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Add new method to control whether warnings should cause validation to fail.
Refactor validation logic to use a dynamic list of severities based on the failOnWarning flag.
Add method to load project classpath into a custom class loader.
Mark logger fields as final to enforce immutability and adhere to modern Java best practices.

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Add imports for URI, URLClassLoader, and ProjectClassLoader to support new test logic.
Mark test instance fields as final to adhere to modern Java coding standards.
Add existence check before creating directories to prevent potential issues or redundant calls.
Add a new test case to verify handling of DMN 1.3 standard examples.
Refactor test assertion to directly assert the boolean result of testFiles instead of storing it in a variable.
Refactor test assertion for duplicate unique validation to directly assert the result.
Add a new test case to verify detection of loops in DMN diagrams.
Add a new test case to verify that the plugin fails when failOnWarning is true.
Add a new test case to verify that the plugin succeeds when failOnWarning is false.
Add a new test case to verify that external artifacts are correctly added to the project classloader.

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.before:

                                                                                                               .getAttributeValue("id"))
                                                                                                  .put("drgElementId", getDrgElementParent(vr.getElement()).getAttributeValue("id"))

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.after:
return new JSONObject().put("items", validationResults
            .stream()
            .map(vr -> new JSONObject()
                .put("id", vr.getElement().getAttributeValue("id"))
                .put("drgElementId", getDrgElementParent(vr.getElement()).getAttributeValue("id"))
                .put("message", vr.getMessage())
                .put("severity", vr.getSeverity().toString()))
            .collect(Collectors.toList()));
